name: contorium
description: Persistent lifecycle workspace memory for AI coding agents: focus, Git, session events, and MCP recall tools.

interface.longDescription: Contorium tracks workspace focus, Git activity, and session context locally. Use MCP tools to recall project state across long Codex tasks without re-explaining the repository.
defaultPrompt: Recall my workspace focus and active files.
Store a design decision in Contorium memory.
Summarize Git and session context before we continue.
